title: Level 352
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:{{Text Transition|id=1|before=Midsummer in Memory|after=Remembrance in Delusion|time=10s}}}} {{Image Banner|image=向远处绵延的夏.jpeg}}
Midsummer stretches far into the endless corridors of memories…


{{Collapse |num=1 |initial=

Summer settles over the whole wilderness, the light is soft, and so is the wind.

Here, time no longer rushes by, only one midsummer moment after another is preserved.

No need to chase anything, no need to bid farewell to anything. Just stand here and meet the past gently.

Cicadas still chirp, the scorching sun remains the same.

The midsummer in memory has never faded away, and the remembrance in midsummer delusion has finally found a place to anchor.



|final=

Summer settles over the whole wilderness, the light is soft, and so is the wind.

Here, time no longer rushes by, only one midsummer moment after another is preserved.

No need to chase anything, no need to bid farewell to anything. Just stand here and meet the past gently.

Cicadas still chirp, the scorching sun remains the same.

The midsummer in memory has never faded away, and the remembrance in midsummer delusion has finally found a place to anchor.



|body=
{{Audio |file=Gymnopedie No.1.mp3 |volume=1.0 |loop=yes |align=center }}
'''Level 352''' is the three hundred and fifty-third midsummer within the first delusion of the Backrooms. {{User:阁楼福克123/Class Custom Image2 |class=0 |bg-image=枝叶间透出的夏意.webp |safety=Safe |security=Stable |entity=Devoid of Entities |hexagon=0 }}
File I: {{Blurimage |file=镜中的夏日原野.jpeg |caption=
By the road, weeds cover the hillsides.
}} ==Environment==

➢'''L''''''evel 352''' presents different appearances for each wanderer. Generally, every scene inside is designed to replicate the truest form of the midsummer suburbs in wanderers' memories, filling the entire level with intense nostalgia.

➢Note that although the environment varies with individual memories, it is permanently fixed in midsummer, with no storms, no seasonal changes, all scenery frozen in its brightest and most peaceful moment. The level is free from the common threats and oppression of the Backrooms, only eternal sunlight bathes the land, warm breezes brush gently, and lush vegetation thrives, making '''Level 352''' another rare safe haven in the Backrooms.

➢The perceived temperature ranges from 30 to 35 degree Celsius, with most areas dry and warm. Day and night do not alternate, and the sky is clear and bright, stretching infinitely in azure, light cyan, or soft white, dotted occasionally with slow-moving clouds. A celestial body simulating [[The Frontrooms|the Frontrooms]] sun hangs aloft, with stable intensity and color temperature, closely matching natural sunlight in mid-latitude regions of Earth in [[The Frontrooms|the Frontrooms]].

➢Surveys show '''Level 352''' has gentle, open terrain with elevation changes rarely exceeding 3 meters, only scattered low mounds adding depth. The soil is fertile, with typical temperate summer vegetation from [[The Frontrooms|the Frontrooms]] growing naturally. Wanderers occasionally find ditches, wells, streams, and ponds; these waters are clear and clean, free of harmful microbes, safe to drink after simple filtration.

➢Most of the level is covered by endless wilderness, including farmlands, wild grasslands, etc. Knee-high herbs grow everywhere, all replicated from [[The Frontrooms|the Frontrooms]] species. Small man-made structures from [[The Frontrooms|the Frontrooms]] such as fences, utility poles, and common items from the Backrooms such as [[Object 1|Almond Water]], [[Object 6|Moth Jelly]] can be found across the wilderness.

➢Toward the edge, sky and clouds meet the earth. Gazing into the distance‌, low hills lie gently on the horizon, ‌about 30 to 50 meters in height‌, with gentle slopes and ‌continuous grass cover‌ stretching across their surfaces. Strangely, no matter how close wanderers approach, the distance never shortens, this suggesting the level most likely has no true physical boundary.

{{Blurimage |file=仲夏原野上的蝴蝶.jpeg |caption=
Butterflies, flowers, and the midsummer.
}}

➢Vintage buildings are scattered across the wilderness: mostly brick houses, bungalows, or abandoned rural cottages under three stories. These reflect wanderers' memories of "home", walls off-white or light gray, some with faded slogans and paintings. Slightly yellowed by time, they exude warmth and nostalgia.

➢Doors and windows are usually half-open, interiors simple but complete, as if abandoned suddenly. Nostalgia peaks here; every corner tells deep memories. Wanderers often find old items from their childhood here, ranging from toys once worn smooth in the palm to desks that accompanied them through countless nights and days. For wanderers, these objects are not mere replicas, but tangible embodiments of homesickness and longing.‌

➢In terms of sounds, '''Level 352''' is always surrounded by the chirping of cicadas, the singing of birds, and the rustling of leaves in the wind. Occasionally, the sounds of air conditioner outdoor units or electric fans operating can be heard near the buildings; all these sounds originate from the deep memories of the entering wanderer. Some wanderers claim to have heard the soft voices of friends and relatives, mostly consisting of daily fragments, but this phenomenon has not yet been fully verified.

➢Regarding the existence of life within '''Level 352''', as of the writing of this document, no Backrooms entities have been discovered on this level.‌ The life forms present include only insects, soil microorganisms, a small number of small animals such as birds, and humans themselves. These organisms constitute a relatively simple yet stable ecological structure, providing wanderers with a peaceful survival environment.



{{User:阁楼福克123/Blurquote2 |image=枝叶间透出的夏意.jpeg |size=1000px |quote-text= |textblock=
File II: {{Blurimage |file=溪流声中流淌的夏.jpeg |caption=
Amidst the green shade, summer flows in the babbling brook.
}} ==Special Properties==

➢Indeed, as mentioned above, the appearance of '''Level 352''' is never fixed, with over fifty percent of its environment derived from the memories of those who enter. This means that wanderers are likely to encounter various fragments from their own memories within this level, whether it be the shade of trees in front of their hometown home, the familiar scenery along the way to school, or the stone-paved path in the park where they once wandered countless times.

➢As a typical non-Euclidean space, the spatial structure within '''Level 352''' is extremely complex, filled with traces of distortion. In this level, if a wanderer chooses a direction and moves forward, they will eventually loop back to their starting point after traveling a sufficiently long distance. This also implies that direction has lost its conventional meaning within the level, making map-making and even navigation impossible. Fortunately, due to the lack of genuine threats within the level, the distorted space does not cause substantial interference or harm to wanderers.

➢Furthermore, there is an obvious [[Phenomenon 15|Alone]] within '''Level 352'''. The level creates a unique instance for each wanderer who enters, this means that wanderers cannot meet each other within this level, and the establishment of human settlements such as bases or outposts remains merely a fantasy.

➢Within '''Level 352''', all mental illnesses suffered by wanderers, regardless of severity, even those deemed terminal, will be alleviated or even cured. Thus, time becomes the remedy for healing, and the vast majority of wanderers choose to stay here for extended periods to leverage these unique phenomena for the comprehensive restoration and consolidation of their mental health.

➢Meanwhile, all scenery within the level adheres to aesthetic principles, such as the golden ratio and symmetrical composition. No matter where a wanderer stands, the view in front of them is a naturally perfect picture, leading many wanderers to refer to '''Level 352''' as "a midsummer wilderness so beautiful it borders on the illusory."



{{User:阁楼福克123/Blurquote2 |image=枝叶间透出的夏意.jpeg |size=1000px |quote-text= |textblock=
File III: {{Blurimage |file=长椅正享受着夏的热烈.jpeg |caption=
The wind did not come, the cicadas did not cease, I stood long in my memories.
}} ==Theories & Speculations==

➢In summary, current academic consensus holds that the environmental structure, special properties, and emotional core of '''Level 352''' all stem from projections of the collective unconscious.

➢According to [[The Kauer Thesis]], the Backrooms themselves constitute a tulpa, created through the [[Phenomenon 9|Tulpafication]] of human collective belief from baseline reality. '''Level 352''' is a special space concretized via a similar mechanism, driven by the pervasive collective nostalgia for childhood life held by humans within [[The Frontrooms|the Frontrooms]] and even the Backrooms themselves. This explains why the scenery of this level closely aligns with the memories of entering wanderers and consistently revolves around the core imagery of "the wilderness of a summer hometown."

➢Some hypotheses suggest that the unreachable low hills at the level's boundaries are likely symbolic constructs of "distant hometowns" within collective memory—marginal imagery incompletely formed during the [[Phenomenon 9|Tulpafication]] process, thus existing merely as visual illusions without actual, accessible spatial substance. However, this inference contradicts the currently most accepted viewpoint, which posits that these low hills, like the modern skyscrapers in [[Level 75]], are purely visual illusions on a spatial level; as of now, neither theory has been definitively proven.

➢If the origin of this level is indeed as described above, it implies that '''Level 352''' may possess a certain capacity for dynamic adjustment, undergoing subtle structural changes in response to variations in entrants' memories and the evolution of collective nostalgia, though this process is typically extremely slow and difficult to capture in short-term observations.



{{User:阁楼福克123/Blurquote2 |image=枝叶间透出的夏意.jpeg |size=1000px |quote-text= |textblock=
File IV: ==Entrances & Exits==
'''Entrances'''

➢In [[Level 0|The Lobby]], fantasizing about scenes of midsummer may bring you here.

➢If the thunderstorm outside the windows of [[Level 4|The Endless Office]] suddenly ceases, continuing forward will lead you to a wooden door that opens to this place.

➢Noclipping into the ground at a specific location in [[Level 11|Concrete Jungle]] will result in your arrival here after a long fall.

➢When [[Level 49|The Endless Dark Road]] is suddenly imbued with the intensity of midsummer, you will be transported here in an instant.

➢It is said that venturing deep into the areas of continuous cicada chirping in [[Level 351|The Enchanted Forest]] allows entry to this place, though this claim remains unverified.

'''Exits'''

➢Entering a bright yellow corridor, or nocliping in areas where the continuous hum of fluorescent lights can be heard, will return you to [[Level 0|Where the Dream Began]].

➢Noclipping within the wheat fields will likely lead you to [[Level 10|The Field of Bumper Crop]].

➢Stepping onto an endless asphalt highway stretching forward may lead you into [[Level 150|The Long Road of Forgetting Worries]].

➢Boarding an ambulance and falling asleep inside it will result in your arrival at [[Phenomenon 354|That Hospital]] shortly upon waking.

➢Entering any amusement park, regardless of its appearance, may cause you to be transported to [[Level 995|Karmaland]].
